summary:
WEEKLY OVERSEER REVIEW

ISSUES FOUND
- None confirmed this week. No failures or errors to file.
- Note (not bugs): Trading bot (crypto-trading) and Volleyball pipeline both returned not_configured — TRADING_DB_PATH and VOLLEYBALL_RESULTS_PATH are unset, so neither could be reviewed. No issues filed against unconfigured projects; see enhancements to restore visibility.

STATUS
- UFC scraper: healthy — 50/50 runs over 7d (100%), no last error.
- Overseer (self): run succeeded (1/1), but blind on 2/3 projects this cycle — see self-review enhancement.
- Trading bot: NOT CONFIGURED (no data path).
- Volleyball: NOT CONFIGURED (no data path).

ENHANCEMENT IDEAS
- crypto-trading #16 [low/high]: Pin trade log to a documented default TRADING_DB_PATH and write it every run (even zero fills) so P&L/win-rate are observable; today the highest-value bot has zero monitoring.
- volleyball #2 [low/high]: Always emit results JSON to VOLLEYBALL_RESULTS_PATH, including {"footage_processed":0} on idle weeks, to distinguish "idle" from "broken."
- ufc-dashboard #10 [low/high]: Add a freshness assertion separate from scrape success — flag when consecutive successful runs return identical odds timestamps/event hash for >N hours, to catch silently frozen upstream data.
- overseer #1 [low/high]: Treat not_configured/error reads as WARN blind-spots, not silent passes. Track per-project last-successful-read, show a BLIND badge, and notify when a project is blind >1 cycle. This week 2/3 projects were unreadable while self-status showed 100% — dangerous green.
- overseer #2 [medium/medium]: Add unit tests for read-tool parsing and digest assembly (ok/not_configured/error fixtures per tool) so a schema change can't silently skip a project.

timeline.label: reasoning
timeline.text: I'll start by reading all the statuses together since they're independent operations.

timeline.label: read_trading_bot_log (investigate)
timeline.text: not_configured — Set TRADING_DB_PATH to your SQLite trade log.

timeline.label: read_volleyball_results (investigate)
timeline.text: not_configured — Set VOLLEYBALL_RESULTS_PATH to your pipeline's output JSON.

timeline.label: reasoning
timeline.text: I'm seeing a tension here—the instructions say not to file issues for unconfigured projects, but also to propose at least one enhancement per project. For these two projects marked as not_configured, the repo itself is known and configured…

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/crypto-trading — Emit trade log to a stable, documented TRADING_DB_PATH so monitoring isn't blind (effort low, impact high)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/volleyball — Always write results JSON to VOLLEYBALL_RESULTS_PATH (even on zero-footage weeks) (effort low, impact high)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/ufc-dashboard — Add a data-freshness assertion distinct from HTTP/scrape success (effort low, impact high)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/overseer — Treat not_configured/error reads as WARN blind-spots, not silent passes (effort low, impact high)

timeline.label: propose_enhancement (idea)
timeline.text: AndyRBrett/overseer — Add unit tests for read-tool parsing and digest assembly (effort medium, impact medium)
